messaging.title: Message Roles Configuration
messaging.subtitle: Configure which roles are allowed in chat messages. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.infoMessage: These roles will be available when creating chat messages. Each role can have a custom emoji for visual identification. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.emojiHelper: Single emoji character for visual identification
messaging.npcCountHelper: Choose how many clones of this role should appear in SwarmDesk (0-5).
messaging.npcColorHelper: Used for the NPC body glow and sidebar identity color.
messaging.npcRoleHelper: Shown above the NPC in SwarmDesk. Leave blank to use the display label.
messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default vibe and fallback dialogue for this NPC.
messaging.duplicateRoleId: A diagnostic protocol with this ID is already registered.
messaging.duplicateAgentId: A clinical specimen with this ID is already logged.

complete.message: Clinical orientation complete. You are now cleared for rounds.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Lab
welcome.description: Inventorium is your AI-powered research management and data visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Let's run through the calibration protocol to help you get started.

projects-overview.title: Research Studies
projects-overview.description: Organize your analysis tasks into research studies for better protocol management and data visualization.
projects-overview.hint: 💡 Protocol Tip: Every analysis can belong to a research study

create-project.title: Initialize First Study
create-project.description: Let's initialize a new study to organize your research. Studies help you group related assays together.
create-project.step1: Click the floating '+' button in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Study Protocol' tab in the dialog
create-project.step3: Enter a unique study ID (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'protocol-alpha-01')
create-project.step4: Add a display name and research abstract
create-project.hint: Tip: Study IDs must be unique and use lowercase letters with hyphens

add-todo.title: Add Assay to Study
add-todo.description: Now let's add an assay to your study. These are the experimental tasks you need to validate.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Assay' tab in the dialog
add-todo.step4: Select your study from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: You can initiate assays from any workstation module using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Configure AI Analysis Assistant
configure-ai.description: Enhance your research workflow by integrating an AI provider like Google Gemini or OpenAI.

benefits.enhance: Optimize assay descriptions with data insights

configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI assistant calibrated and validated!
configure-ai.helpText: AI assistant can be calibrated anytime via Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: AI Research Assistant
ai-assistant.description: Leverage your AI assistant to manage protocols, analyze data patterns, and enhance research productivity.
ai-assistant.hint: 💡 Protocol Tip: Access the assistant interface to begin

swarmdesk.title: 3D Analysis Workspace
swarmdesk.description: Explore your codebase in 3D with SwarmDesk - an immersive data visualization tool.
swarmdesk.hint: 💡 Protocol Tip: Access workspace from study dashboard
swarmdesk.tabTip: After workspace initialization, press TAB to switch between control panel and 3D analysis environment

complete.title: Calibration Complete!
complete.description: Your research workstation is ready. Begin exploring and conducting your analyses.
complete.footer: 💡 You can replay this protocol anytime from System Settings

analytics.title: Clinical Analytics Suite
analytics.description: Advanced clinical charts and diagnostic visualization instruments are currently being calibrated. Check back soon for powerful insights into personnel activity, system performance, and laboratory productivity metrics.
analytics.futureHint: Future enhancements: Custom date ranges, CSV export, real-time monitoring, cohort analysis, and predictive diagnostics powered by cellular intelligence!

confirm.title: Confirm Protocol Flag Changes
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to apply these protocol changes? This will immediately affect all lab personnel across the platform. Protocol flags control access to core lab functionality.
confirm.warning: Tip: Test changes in a staging environment first. Disabling critical protocols may disrupt research workflows.

umlData.title: Code Visualizations
umlData.description: Manage UML data files for 3D code city visualization in SwarmDesk

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

instructions.title: How to use:
instructions.step1: Install the UML generator: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate UML from your codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated JSON file using the button above

umlData.empty.hint: Upload a UML file to see your code in 3D
